Enumeration Case# kIOUSB30LinkStateHotResetDeadline

macOS 12.0+

```
kIOUSB30LinkStateHotResetDeadline = kIOUSB30LinkStateHotResetActiveTimeout + kIOUSB30LinkStateHotResetExitTimeout + 1
```
